name: psyblr
description: Psyblr monorepo containing the web app, backend worker scaffold, and shared game engine.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @psyblr/game-engine && npm run build --workspace @psyblr/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @psyblr/game-engine && npm run check --workspace @psyblr/server && npm run build --workspace @psyblr/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @psyblr/game-engine && npm run test --workspace @psyblr/server && npm run test --workspace @psyblr/web
